title: reproduce report
description: Self-contained PoC produced for an existing finding. The combination of `poc`, `command`, and `transcript` should let an analyst (or a downstream skill) re-run the demonstration without consulting the original prose.

outcome.description: reproduced = PoC ran and the dangerous behaviour fired. not_reproducible = sink is gone or unreachable; cite evidence in notes. inconclusive = environmental reason; explain what would be needed.

language.description: Interpreter or runtime the PoC uses. Must be available in the runner image; pick the smallest one that triggers the bug. Use 'c' or 'cpp' for native PoCs built with clang/gcc; record the sanitizer flags in `assumptions`.

command.description: Exact shell command run to execute the PoC, e.g. 'php /tmp/poc.php' or 'python3 /tmp/poc.py'.

poc.description: Full source of the PoC script, ready to paste into a file. Self-checking: ends with a clear success/failure signal (printed marker or non-zero exit).

fixtures.description: Extra files the PoC needs at runtime (crafted archive, malformed YAML, phar payload, etc.). Inline-encoded so the report is self-contained.

path.description: Relative path the PoC expects, e.g. 'evil.tar'.

transcript.description: Combined stdout/stderr from running the PoC, truncated to roughly 4000 chars per stream. The reader should be able to verify the dangerous behaviour from this alone.

exit_code.description: Process exit code from running the PoC.

assumptions.description: Preconditions the PoC requires (PHP extension, environment variable, vendored package, etc.). Should match what the runner image provides; otherwise outcome should be inconclusive.

cleanup.description: Optional shell snippet to undo any side effects the PoC produced (markers, temp files). The runner is ephemeral so this is informational, not strictly required.

patched_validation.description: True if this skill PATCHed the finding's `validation` field with the rebuilt PoC. Only set when outcome=reproduced and the original validation prose was thin.

notes.description: Short prose: what made the PoC succeed/fail, what the analyst should know, anything non-obvious.
